title: Plant Surge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{ForcePower
|image=[[File:Plant_Surge_JATM.jpg]]
|name=Plant Surge
|alternate=''Consitor Sato''<ref name="Jedi Path">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>
|alignment=[[Light side of the Force/Legends|Light side of the Force]]<ref name="POTJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>
|area=[[Alter (Jedi Order)|Alter]]<ref name="Jedi Path" />

'''Plant Surge''', known as '''''Consitor Sato ''''' in traditional [[High Galactic (language)|High Galactic]], was a [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] that was based around drawing on [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and channeling of life energy into [[Plant/Legends|plants]].

==Description==
Plant Surge, or ''Consitor Sato'',<ref name="Jedi Path" /> was a [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]]<ref name="POTJ" /> [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] which allowed the user to improve the [[Plant/Legends|plant's]] rate of growth and even affect the manner in which it grew. In battle, the ability to control a plant's growth with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] could be used to cause plants to grow with incredible speed directly under the user's control, causing plant life to grow and twist around opponents, ensnaring anyone who was not quick enough to avoid it. Once ensnared, the victim would find it difficult to dodge and fight, and nearly impossible to move unless they escaped through force or finesse. The Jedi used this to end conflicts with minimal violence.<ref name="Jedi Path" />

==Users==
[[Kar Vastor]], [[Lor pelek]] to the people of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], often used this power subliminally during his travels across the vast jungles of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], clearing plants and vines from his way to avoid harm from the many dangerous flora [[Species/Legends|species]]. Vastor also used this power actively during a confrontation with fellow [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]], and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], binding the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] with a variety of vines in an attempt to restrain him. This attempt ultimately backfired, as Windu used the vines' momentum to continue his attack on Vastor.<ref name="Shatterpoint">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>

Fellow Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] used this technique in conjunction with [[Animal bond|animal friendship]] against [[Galen Marek]] during their [[Mission to Felucia (Great Jedi Purge)|duel]] on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]], commanding the local [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] to lash out at the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] with its feeding tentacles. Marek ignored or knocked away most attempts at attack in this method.<ref name="SW:TFUc">[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (graphic novel)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed'' graphic novel]]</ref>

The Jedi Master known as the [[The Dark Woman|Dark Woman]] used this power on [[Cophrigin V]] to restrain [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] while [[Duel on Cophrigin V|dueling]] in order to strike him down. Vader proved too difficult to contain, however, and cut himself free in order to [[Death/Legends|kill]] her.<ref name="Extinction">{{Tales|issue1=1|issue2=2|Extinction}}</ref>

[[Abeloth]], Bringer of Chaos, could control the plants on her [[Abeloth's planet|home planet]], using them to her advantage against those who would enter her domain.<ref name="FotJ:A">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Abyss]]''</ref>

This ability was among the favorite [[Alter (Jedi Order)|Alter]] abilities of [[Jedi Seer]] [[Sabla-Mandibu]].<ref name="Jedi Path" />
